intro: The factory's salvage yard is heaped with rusted, worn-down parts - shapes you can barely make out under the grime. A scrapper grins and waves you toward the heap: pull out what you can name, the rest is junk.
title: The Salvage Yard
description: A scrap heap of corroded parts, each just a worn silhouette. Identify a part correctly and you reclaim it - guess wrong and it crumbles to rust. The more you can name, the more you keep.
query: Will you dig through the scrap?

1.label: Sort the scrap heap
1.tooltip:
(+) Name each part from its silhouette
(+) Keep one held item per part you identify correctly
1.selected: You crouch by the heap and start matching shapes to parts...

2.label: Leave it be
2.selected: You leave the scrap to rust and move on.

reclaimed: You pried {{count}} usable part(s) from the heap: {{parts}}. The rest crumbled to rust.
